title: Google's Agents CLI: The CLI + Skills Combination to Ship AI Agents EASILY
summary: Google's Agents CLI is an open-source tool that enables developers to build and deploy AI agents to production quickly. It provides agent identity, sandboxed code execution, and audit trails for production-grade AI agents. The CLI works with various AI coding assistants including Claude.
writeup: This video from Cole Medin examines Google's Agents CLI, an open-source tool for building and deploying AI agents to production. It covers the CLI's core features: agent identity, sandboxed code execution, and audit trails, all aimed at production-grade deployments. The video notes that the CLI works with various AI coding assistants, including Claude. The combination of CLI tooling and skills is positioned as a path to shipping agents with less friction.
